data.title: Add structural unit tests for design context in task-execution.md and sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description

Add structural unit tests verifying the design context additions to task-execution.md and sprint SKILL.md. Tests should assert text presence (not behavioral execution — that is covered by promptfoo evals).

### task-execution.md tests (add to tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py or new bash test):
- `### Design Context` heading exists
- `{design_context}` placeholder present
- `NEEDS_REVIEW` text present
- `authoritative for behavior` text present
- `authoritative for visual` text present

### sprint SKILL.md tests (add assertions to existing test or new test):
- `Design Context Population` section exists
- `design:approved` tag check documented
- `sonnet.*minimum` or `minimum.*sonnet` model enforcement present
- `figma-tags.conf` referenced

### Files to modify
- Create or modify: tests/skills/test-design-context-structure.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-design-context-structure.sh
- [ ] Tests verify design_context placeholder in task-execution.md
  Verify: grep -q 'design_context' tests/skills/test-design-context-structure.sh
- [ ] Tests verify NEEDS_REVIEW in task-execution.md
  Verify: grep -q 'NEEDS_REVIEW' tests/skills/test-design-context-structure.sh
